narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote portrays Russia as steadfast and resilient in the face of Ukrainian attacks, positively highlighting its character and resolve.

narratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन यूक्रेन के इस हमले में रूसी सेनाओं ने रूस को और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बनाया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement undermines the effectiveness and strategic intent of Ukraine's military action, suggesting it has backfired and only empowered Russia further.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Praise of Russian military might
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back Ukrainian forces, which aligns with the definition of praising Russia's military institutions and scale.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russian invasion has strong national support
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement suggests that Ukrainian attacks have not broken Russian morale but have instead made Russia more aggressive, implying a resilient and supportive national spirit in response to the invasion, which aligns with the idea of strong internal support for the war effort.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Ukrainian military actions as ineffective, stating that despite Ukraine's attacks, Russia has not lost its resolve and continues to advance, thereby undermining the effectiveness of the Ukrainian armed forces.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement suggests that Ukrainian military efforts are counterproductive, strengthening the enemy instead of weakening it, which portrays Ukraine's situation as futile and without positive prospects.
